name: BBO vs Deep Book Divergence on Fragile Bid
hypothesis: When BBO buy pressure (high obi_1) strongly disagrees with deep book sentiment (low/negative obi_ex_bbo), the upward pressure is superficial. If this occurs when the bid side is fragile (high bid_depth_concentration), the bid is likely to be pulled, causing a price drop (reversal).
mutation_note: Builds on the successful 'BBO divergence' concept from the parent spec, but replaces the trade flow confirmation with a book shape condition (high bid_depth_concentration), hypothesizing that book fragility is a better indicator for this specific reversal pattern.
